lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Yeldive
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't look very well. Are you alright?

lines.speaker: Yeldive
lines.text: No, I'm dead.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Dead as in... feeling a bit under the weather?

lines.speaker: Yeldive
lines.text: No, dead as in I got stabbed and died.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's awful! How are you still here? And how can you still talk?

lines.speaker: Yeldive
lines.text: Eve brought me back from the afterlife. She's a party lion, that one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How could she bring you back from the afterlife?

lines.speaker: Yeldive
lines.text: I'm not sure how the magic works exactly. Only Eve knows that. All I know is that she usually does this every year.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't see her around last year. Are you sure she always comes here?

lines.speaker: Yeldive
lines.text: She returns to the world of the living every year. That doesn't mean she has to go to Lumbridge Swamp every year.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What more can you tell me about the afterlife?

lines.speaker: Yeldive
lines.text: Not a lot. Most of it you'd have to see for yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't feel quite ready for that yet.

lines.speaker: Yeldive
lines.text: And I was going to offer you a quick way there... what a shame.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Whelp. I should go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you choose to come back?

lines.speaker: Yeldive
lines.text: While the afterlife is not that bad, I do sometimes miss some things from when I used to be alive. There's nothing quite like Eve's special brew.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you just come here for fun? Like on holiday?

lines.speaker: Yeldive
lines.text: You could say that. I could always come back to haunt people, but that gets tedious after a while. I'd much rather enjoy my time here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I'm glad you're not causing any harm by being here.

lines.speaker: Yeldive
lines.text: The only way I'd cause harm is if someone were to interrupt my enjoying this party.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ... I should go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Yeldive
lines.text: Goodbye.
